## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes with no errors
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] `bun run format` has been run (or no formatting changes needed)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits format (`feat(scope):`, `fix(scope):`, etc.) with no emoji
- [ ] This PR targets the `staging` branch (not `main`)
- [ ] I have built and manually smoke-tested the change with `bun run build:unpack`
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and agree that my contribution is provided under the project's contribution terms
